name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA New Large Hop. This large shoulder bag is stitched with mint, white, and berry leather strips, evoking the animal skin skirts of primitive tribes with an exotic flair. The 2024 show color blocking is very premium, mimicking tropical rainforest elements. The multiple leather strips woven in various colors create a large, lightweight silhouette, and the leather is surprisingly light and soft.
